tasks.title: Create test fixture files for installer JSON merge and integration tests
tasks.model_rationale: Bounded single-file task creating static fixture files with no architectural judgment
tasks.summary: Created 6 fixture files in tests/fixtures/installer/: settings-empty.json, settings-existing-hooks.json, settings-existing-env.json, settings-malformed.json, settings-with-permissions.json, firebreak-settings.json

tasks.title: Write tests for JSON merge hook handling: additive merge, deduplication, permissions preservation
tasks.model_rationale: Tests exercise complex merge semantics with multiple edge cases requiring careful assertion design
tasks.summary: Created tests/installer/test-json-merge-hooks.sh with 5 TAP tests: empty settings merge, appending to existing hooks, deduplication, different matchers preserved, permissions untouched.

tasks.title: Write tests for JSON merge env handling: additive add, no-overwrite, manifest recording, malformed input
tasks.model_rationale: Tests exercise env merge semantics and error handling with multiple edge cases
tasks.summary: Created tests/installer/test-json-merge-env.sh with 6 TAP tests: env added to empty, no overwrite of existing, actually-added tracking for new keys, actually-added omits pre-existing, malformed JSON error, missing settings creates env.

tasks.title: Implement Python 3 JSON merge script for settings.json hook/env merging
tasks.model_rationale: Core merge logic with matcher-group deduplication and manifest output — requires careful implementation
tasks.summary: Created installer/merge-settings.py. All 11 tests pass (5 hook, 6 env). Updated test helpers to handle ---MANIFEST--- separator format.

tasks.title: Write tests for fresh install: file copying, manifest creation, backup, prereqs, dry-run, target selection
tasks.model_rationale: Multi-concern integration tests requiring temp directory management and careful assertion design
tasks.summary: Created tests/installer/test-install.sh with 10 TAP tests covering fresh install, file validation, manifest, backup, prereqs, project-level install, dry-run, file preservation.

tasks.title: Write tests for upgrade and uninstall: idempotent overwrite, surgical settings removal, env value-matching
tasks.model_rationale: Complex integration tests for upgrade/uninstall paths with multiple edge cases
tasks.summary: Created tests/installer/test-upgrade-uninstall.sh with 13 TAP tests covering upgrade overwrite, manifest update, hook dedup, non-fbk preservation, uninstall file/hook/env removal, env value-matching, manifest cleanup, error states.

tasks.title: Implement install.sh main script: install, upgrade, uninstall, dry-run modes
tasks.model_rationale: Main orchestration script with multiple modes, bash 3.2 constraints, and integration with merge script
tasks.summary: Created installer/install.sh (bash 3.2+ compatible). All 34 tests pass. Fixed test-install.sh test 3 path-vs-content bug during verification.

tasks.title: Write e2e lifecycle test: full install -> upgrade -> uninstall cycle (final validation gate)
tasks.model_rationale: Full lifecycle test requiring understanding of all installer modes and their interactions
tasks.summary: Created tests/installer/test-e2e-lifecycle.sh with 16 TAP tests. Fixed manifest settings_entries preservation on upgrade in install.sh. All 50 tests pass across 5 test suites.
tasks.note: Final validation gate: feature is not complete until T-06 passes. Cannot be a completion_gate on T-08 due to circular dependency (T-06 depends on T-08). The /implement workflow enforces completion of all tasks including this one.
